name: Hyperparameter Optimization
description: Hyperparameter optimization searches configuration space for the best-performing model: a strategy is chosen among grid, random, or Bayesian search, candidate configurations are sampled, scored by cross-validation, and the best is tracked; sampling continues until the budget is exhausted, returning the optimal hyperparameters.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Model + search space"]
    N2{"Choose search strategy"}
    N3["Grid search"]
    N4["Random search"]
    N5["Bayesian optimization"]
    N6["Sample configuration"]
    N7["Cross-validate score"]
    N8{"Better than best?"}
    N9["Update best config"]
    N10{"Budget exhausted?"}
    N11["Best hyperparameters"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 -->|grid| N3
    N2 -->|random| N4
    N2 -->|bayesian| N5
    N3 --> N6
    N4 --> N6
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|yes| N9
    N9 --> N10
    N8 -->|no| N10
    N10 -->|no| N6
    N10 -->|yes| N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff

sources.title: Practical Bayesian optimization of machine learning algorithms
sources.authors: Snoek, J.; Larochelle, H.; Adams, R. P.
sources.journal: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
